zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad verch Ednyfed於大約1284年出生在英國威爾斯尼德時，她的父親Ednyfed ap Tudur-60歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Dafydd-67歲。她和Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth "Ddû"至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad verch Ednyfed于大约1284年出生在英国威尔斯尼德时，她的父亲Ednyfed ap Tudur-60岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Dafydd-67岁。她和Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth "Ddû"至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad verch Ednyfed was born about 1284, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Ednyfed ap Tudur, was -60 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Dafydd, was -67. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth "Ddû".

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Ednyfed(이)가 대략 1284년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ednyfed ap Tudur(은)는 -60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Dafydd(은)는 -67세였다. 그녀는 Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth "Ddû"(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
